{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/raw_gold.png
|block_health=50
|block_resistance=8.5
|rotation=ore
|ore_range= Below -2000
}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
Gold ore and coal can be crafted into [[Gold Ingot|gold ingots]].

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Items]]
[[Category:Ores]]
